source_milestone: R15 Knowledge Base, Agent Identity, Memory, and RACI Foundations

index_scope.description: Bounded seed set of current authority and R15 foundation references only.
excluded_scope: No product runtime, board runtime, integration, direct agent access runtime, or engine artifacts.
No R15-008 through R15-009 implementation artifacts.

invalid_state_rules.description: The R15-003 index must remain a bounded seed and must not claim broad classification.
A full repo index or full repo scan claim fails validation.
Entry classification, evidence, authority, lifecycle, and proof values must be allowed by the R15-002 taxonomy.
Relationships must reference known entry IDs or explicit external refs.
Runtime, board, integration, true multi-agent, persistent memory, solved Codex, and R16 claims fail validation.

R15-004 updates the bounded seed index with agent identity packet contract and baseline packet entries.

R15-005 updates the bounded seed index with agent memory scope contract and baseline model entries.
R15-005 updates status surfaces for R15 active through R15-005 only.
R15-006 updates the bounded seed index with RACI/state-transition matrix contract, state, manifest, and proof-review entries.
R15-007 updates the bounded seed index with card re-entry packet contract, state, manifest, and proof-review entries.
